name: Marriott Mena House
description: A historic, luxury hotel offering unparalleled, up-close views of the magnificent Great Pyramids right from your balcony or the lush gardens.

name: Steigenberger Pyramids
description: An elegant, modern resort situated right next to the new Grand Egyptian Museum, offering comfortable rooms and excellent dining options.

name: The Nile Ritz-Carlton
description: An iconic luxury hotel located in the heart of downtown Cairo, situated beautifully between the Nile River and vibrant Tahrir Square.

name: Fairmont Nile City
description: Boasting sweeping panoramas of the River Nile and the distant Pyramids, this hotel offers art-deco elegance and premium rooftop pools.

name: Kempinski Nile Hotel
description: A boutique luxury hotel situated in the upscale Garden City district, offering personalized butler service and excellent culinary experiences.

name: Sofitel Cairo Nile El Gezirah
description: Located on an island in the middle of the Nile, this French-inspired hotel offers waterfront promenades and uninterrupted river views.

name: Sofitel Winter Palace
description: A historic, grand hotel on the banks of the Nile built in 1886. Agatha Christie famously wrote 'Death on the Nile' in this very hotel.

name: Hilton Luxor Resort
description: A tranquil, modern resort located on the east bank of the Nile, known for its award-winning spa, infinity pools, and serene atmosphere.

name: Steigenberger Nile Palace
description: Offering beautiful architecture and excellent river views, this hotel provides a relaxing courtyard setting in the heart of Luxor.

name: Sofitel Legend Old Cataract
description: An iconic 19th-century Victorian palace rising from the pink granite desert, offering the most majestic sunset views over the Nile in all of Egypt.

name: Movenpick Resort Aswan
description: Set entirely on Elephantine Island in the middle of the Nile, offering panoramic river views, beautiful gardens, and complete tranquility.

name: Four Seasons Hotel Alexandria
description: An ultra-luxurious, Mediterranean-style resort set within the prestigious San Stefano complex, offering a private sandy beach and classic elegance.

name: Steigenberger Cecil Hotel
description: A historic 1920s hotel steeped in literature and espionage history, perfectly located directly on the sweeping Alexandria Corniche.

name: Steigenberger ALDAU Beach
description: A spectacular beach resort offering expansive pools, a private golf course, and exclusive access to the pristine waters of the Red Sea.

name: Sunrise Crystal Bay
description: An elegant, adults-only resort featuring a tranquil private lagoon, modern suites, and highly-rated international dining options.

name: Four Seasons Resort Sharm El Sheikh
description: A stunning, village-style luxury resort offering world-class diving, spectacular Red Sea views, and exceptional, personalized service.

name: Rixos Premium Seagate
description: A massive, ultra-all-inclusive premium resort featuring an extensive aqua park, luxury cabanas, and highly energetic daily entertainment.

name: Badawiya Hotel Farafra
description: An authentic, eco-friendly mud-brick lodge providing comfortable basecamps for those preparing to explore the incredible White Desert.

name: Adrere Amellal
description: A world-famous, completely electricity-free eco-lodge built into a mountain. Illuminated entirely by beeswax candles, it offers absolute luxury and peace.

name: Swiss Inn Resort Dahab
description: A relaxed, family-friendly beachfront resort set directly on the golden sands of the Red Sea, famous for windsurfing and easy diving access.
